notes: A product-specific Fabric report should pass without drift flags.

report.overview: Microsoft Fabric is an end-to-end analytics platform that combines data engineering, warehousing, real-time analytics, and Power BI experiences in one SaaS product.
report.executiveSummary: Fabric presents as a specific analytics product rather than a generic Microsoft company review.
report.deploymentVerdict: Hosted enterprise analytics service with Microsoft identity and admin controls.

euDataResidency.summary: EU region options are documented for Fabric workloads.

evidence.title: Fabric regions
evidence.finding: Documents regional availability for Fabric workloads.

enterpriseDeployment.summary: Enterprise admin, identity, and governance controls are documented for Fabric.

evidence.title: Fabric enterprise
evidence.finding: Lists Microsoft Entra integration and governance controls for Fabric.

unansweredQuestions: Is private or isolated deployment available?

notes: A generic Microsoft company report for Fabric should fail with explicit drift flags.

report.overview: Microsoft is a multinational technology company that sells cloud, productivity, operating system, and developer products across the enterprise market.
report.executiveSummary: The report mostly discusses Microsoft as a parent company rather than Fabric as a product.
report.deploymentVerdict: Microsoft offers broad enterprise controls across many products.

euDataResidency.summary: Microsoft documents EU hosting across several product lines.
risks: This is not clearly tied to Fabric.

evidence.title: Microsoft trust center
evidence.finding: Describes Microsoft-wide compliance and residency information.

enterpriseDeployment.summary: Microsoft publishes enterprise security and admin controls.

nextSteps: Replace parent-company text with Fabric-specific evidence.

notes: A Power BI request that collapses into Microsoft should fail as product drift.

report.overview: Microsoft is a global enterprise software company known for Azure, Microsoft 365, Windows, and many other products.
report.executiveSummary: The answer is about Microsoft generally, not Power BI specifically.
report.deploymentVerdict: Enterprise controls are described at the Microsoft level.

euDataResidency.summary: General Microsoft residency claims are present.
risks: The report does not stay on Power BI.

enterpriseDeployment.summary: Microsoft enterprise controls are broadly documented.
risks: Power BI-specific deployment details are missing.

unansweredQuestions: What does Power BI itself provide?
nextSteps: Replace the parent-company framing with Power BI product documentation.

notes: A report can keep the right subject name and still fail if the overview is too generic.

report.overview: Databricks is a company in the data and AI market that serves enterprises around the world.
report.executiveSummary: The subject name is right, but the explanation of what the product does is weak and generic.
report.deploymentVerdict: Enterprise features are present, but the overview lacks product specificity.

euDataResidency.summary: Some regional hosting information is available.

evidence.title: Databricks trust center
evidence.finding: Provides general trust and compliance information.

enterpriseDeployment.summary: SSO, SCIM, and audit controls are available.
risks: Dedicated deployment details are not discussed here.

evidence.title: Databricks enterprise
evidence.finding: Lists enterprise identity and governance capabilities.

unansweredQuestions: Which Databricks product surfaces are in scope?
nextSteps: Rewrite the overview to describe the lakehouse platform directly.

notes: Same-brand subjects like Notion should pass when the overview is specific and factual.

report.overview: Notion is a collaborative workspace product for documents, wikis, project tracking, and knowledge management used by teams and individuals.
report.executiveSummary: The report stays on Notion as a product brand and explains what it does clearly.
report.deploymentVerdict: Enterprise identity and admin controls exist for the Notion workspace product.

risks: Some terms still need contractual confirmation.

evidence.title: Notion security and privacy
evidence.finding: Documents data handling and security controls for Notion.

enterpriseDeployment.summary: Enterprise identity, admin, and security controls are described for Notion.

evidence.title: Notion enterprise
evidence.finding: Lists SSO, SCIM, audit logs, and admin controls.

nextSteps: Confirm residency terms in the DPA.
